title: Weight Method, Spel Class
syntax:
Sub Weight (PayloadWeight As Single, ArmLength As Single)

Sub Weight (PayloadWeight As Single, Axis As SpelAxis)
parameters:
PayloadWeight	The weight of the end effector to be carried in Kg unit.

ArmLength	The distance from the rotational center of the second arm to the center of the gravity of the end effector in mm unit.

Axis	Specifies which additional axis (S or T) is assign the payload weight.
description: Specifies the weight parameters for the current robot.
see_also:
Tool

Weight Example

VB Example:

m_spel.Weight(2, 2.5)

C# Example:

m_spel.Weight(2, 2.5);
